//: ILLUSTRATIVE example package.json for a Sentinel Shield consuming project (React + Vite).
//merge: Merge the devDependencies and sentinel:* scripts into your real package.json; do not overwrite it or your existing test/build scripts.
name: your-org-your-react-app

scripts.sentinel:quality: npm run sentinel:npm-audit && npm run sentinel:typescript && npm run sentinel:eslint

//scripts-notes: sentinel:typescript writes reports/raw/typescript.json {errors:N} -> type_errors. The shell above writes 0 on success; in CI prefer counting 'error TS' lines on failure (see the workflow) so the real count is captured.
sentinel:eslint writes native ESLint JSON -> errorCount=type_errors, warningCount=medium_vulnerabilities, security/no-unsanitized severity-2=high_vulnerabilities (conservative, tunable).
sentinel:test:node normalizes a Vitest/Jest JSON report (reports/raw/node-tests.json) to reports/raw/tests.json {failures,errors}. Run your test runner with JSON output first; do NOT fake it.
